creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text: Port added as of ports r399971, thank you!  I've made a few changes and style fixes; also, after some consideration I've decided to use "fallback" category of `misc' rather than proposed `deskutils' because `deskutils' typically refers to desktop-oriented applications which often implies GUI, etc. while command-line tools can be used e.g. remotely from a TI-85 calculator or something.  Looking for command-line utilities, the last category I would think of would be `desktop'.
